tags.name: `mc-button`
tags.description:
Purpose: A customizable button component that supports various appearances, states, and interactions to trigger actions and navigate between pages
Category: Actions
When to use: Form submissions, Navigation actions, Triggering events
When not to use: Navigation links, Text formatting
Works with components: all components
Alternative component names: User Avatar, Profile Picture, User Icon

Events:

  * ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the button is clicked.

  * ``focus`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is focused.

  * ``blur`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is blurred.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - 

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - 

  * `submit` {`Event`} - 

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the `button`. Used to display custom text/icon in the middle of the button.

  * ``icon`` {} - The icon HTML to use for the `button`.

  * ``trailingicon`` {} - The trailing icon HTML to use for the `button`.

  * ``badge`` {} - Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-button.

Attributes:

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `variant` {`ButtonVariants`} - Variant of the button.

  * `appearance` {`ButtonAppearance`} - Appearance of the button.

  * `padding` {`ButtonPadding | undefined`} - Padding of the button.

  * `border` {`ButtonBorder | undefined`} - Border style of the button.
default: Default border style
none: No border

  * `rounded` {`boolean`} - Whether the button should have fully rounded corners.

  * `justifyitems` {`JustifyItems`} - Allows to position items inside the button like label text & icon.
Specially useful when using width="full-width".

  * `width` {`Width`} - width style depends on the text length,
full-width style will adjust to the parent container width.

  * `active` {`boolean`} - Sets button in the `active` state.

  * `type` {`Type`} - Sets the button type.

  * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Sets the button nae=me.

  * `loading` {`boolean`} - Sets button in the indeterminate state.

  * `arialabel` {`string`} - Should only be used if for the sake of accessibility the `aria-label` is differnt that the label which appears on the button,
so that for instance the screen reader can provide more details than what's being visually displayed as a label on the button component.

  * `ariacurrent` {`AriaCurrent`} - Sets the `aria-current` on the inner button in cases like pagination where the button is repeated in a list and at the same time,
the currently active item needs to be specified.

  * `ariaexpanded` {`AriaExpanded | undefined`} - Sets the `aria-expanded` on the inner button in cases like tab where the button is expanded in a list and at the same time,
the currently expanded item needs to be specified.

  * `ariaselected` {`AriaSelected | undefined`} - Sets the `aria-selected` on the inner button in cases like tab where the button is repeated in a list and at the same time,
the currently selected item needs to be specified.

  * `href` {`string`} - Passing a href value will render the button as a HTML anchor element.

  * `rel` {`string`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

  * `dialogaction` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `focusstartanchor` {`boolean`} - 

  * `focusendanchor` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets button in the `disabled` state, which will disable any user interaction with the button.

Properties:

  * `button` {`HTMLButtonElement | null`} - 

  * `computedAriaLabel` {`string`} - 

  * `cssclass` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `shadowRootOptions` {`ShadowRootInit`} - 

  * `_internals` {`ElementInternals`} - 

  * `variant` {`ButtonVariants`} - Variant of the button.

  * `appearance` {`ButtonAppearance`} - Appearance of the button.

  * `padding` {`ButtonPadding | undefined`} - Padding of the button.

  * `border` {`ButtonBorder | undefined`} - Border style of the button.
default: Default border style
none: No border

  * `rounded` {`boolean`} - Whether the button should have fully rounded corners.

  * `justifyitems` {`JustifyItems`} - Allows to position items inside the button like label text & icon.
Specially useful when using width="full-width".

  * `width` {`Width`} - width style depends on the text length,
full-width style will adjust to the parent container width.

  * `active` {`boolean`} - Sets button in the `active` state.

  * `type` {`Type`} - Sets the button type.

  * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Sets the button nae=me.

  * `loading` {`boolean`} - Sets button in the indeterminate state.

  * `arialabel` {`string`} - Should only be used if for the sake of accessibility the `aria-label` is differnt that the label which appears on the button,
so that for instance the screen reader can provide more details than what's being visually displayed as a label on the button component.

  * `ariacurrent` {`AriaCurrent`} - Sets the `aria-current` on the inner button in cases like pagination where the button is repeated in a list and at the same time,
the currently active item needs to be specified.

  * `ariaexpanded` {`AriaExpanded | undefined`} - Sets the `aria-expanded` on the inner button in cases like tab where the button is expanded in a list and at the same time,
the currently expanded item needs to be specified.

  * `ariaselected` {`AriaSelected | undefined`} - Sets the `aria-selected` on the inner button in cases like tab where the button is repeated in a list and at the same time,
the currently selected item needs to be specified.

  * `ariarole` {`string | undefined`} - Sets the `role` on the inner button in cases like tab-bar where of every button is 'tab',

  * `href` {`string`} - Passing a href value will render the button as a HTML anchor element.

  * `rel` {`string`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

  * `slot` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `dialogaction` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `focusstartanchor` {`boolean`} - 

  * `focusendanchor` {`boolean`} - 

  * `focus` - Sets the focus to the button

  * `blur` - Takes focus out of the button

  * `click` - Click on the button

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets button in the `disabled` state, which will disable any user interaction with the button.

  * `_onMouseDown` -
